name: GCS Monitor
description: Monitor a Google Cloud Storage bucket prefix for new objects and trigger jobs when matching objects are detected

triggers.description: Triggers when new objects are detected in the monitored GCS bucket prefix

outputs.description: Passes object information (bucket, name, size, etag, updated, content_type) to triggered jobs via run_config

bucket_name.label: Bucket Name
bucket_name.description: Name of the GCS bucket to monitor

prefix.label: Prefix
prefix.description: Object prefix to scope monitoring (e.g., 'incoming/' or 'data/2024/')

blob_pattern.label: Blob Pattern
blob_pattern.description: Regex pattern to match object names relative to the prefix (e.g., '.*\.parquet$')

job_name.label: Job Name
job_name.description: Name of the job to trigger when objects are detected

project.label: GCP Project ID
project.description: GCP project ID. Uses the project from Application Default Credentials if not set.

resource_key.label: Resource Key
resource_key.description: Optional Dagster resource key providing a pre-configured client. When set, context.resources.<resource_key> is used instead of creating a connection from the other fields. See README for the expected interface.
